serendipity.meaning_ja: 偶然に素晴らしいものを見つけること
serendipity.example: Finding this song was pure serendipity.

gonna.meaning_ja: （くだけた表現）〜するつもり、〜する予定
gonna.example: I'm gonna learn English no matter what.

wanna.meaning: Informal contraction of 'want to' or 'want a'
wanna.example: I wanna hold a fluent English conversation.

gotta.meaning: Informal contraction of 'have got to' or 'got to' (must)
gotta.meaning_ja: （くだけた表現）〜しなければならない
gotta.example: I gotta study my grammar cards today.

kinda.meaning_ja: （くだけた表現）ちょっと、ある程度
kinda.example: This lesson is kinda difficult but fun.

sorta.meaning_ja: （くだけた表現）多少、言ってみれば
sorta.example: I sorta understand what they are saying.

lemme.example: Lemme check my vocabulary score list.

dunno.meaning_ja: （くだけた表現）わからない、知らない
dunno.example: I dunno how to explain this slang phrase.

outta.meaning_ja: （くだけた表現）〜から外へ、〜が切れて
outta.example: I'm outta streak freezes! Protect my days!

watcha.meaning: Informal contraction of 'what are you' or 'what have you'
watcha.meaning_ja: （くだけた表現）あなたは何を〜しているの？
watcha.example: Watcha doing for your listening challenge?

bro.meaning: Slang short for brother; used to refer to a friend
bro.meaning_ja: （スラング）おい、相棒、君（主に親しい仲で使われる）
bro.example: Bro, did you see CaseOh's latest stream?

chat.meaning: An online audience in a livestream; informal conversation
chat.meaning_ja: 雑談、（ストリーミングの）視聴者一同
chat.example: CaseOh always yells at chat when they tease him.

noob.meaning: Slang for a beginner or novice at something
noob.meaning_ja: （ネットスラング）初心者、新参者、下手くそ
noob.example: Don't worry, everyone starts as a noob.

flex.meaning: Slang: to show off accomplishments or belongings boastfully
flex.meaning_ja: （ネットスラング）自慢する、見せびらかす
flex.example: Boasting a 90-day streak is a massive flex.

salty.meaning: Slang: feeling upset, angry, or bitter over minor things
salty.meaning_ja: （スラング）悔しがっている、イライラしている
salty.example: He got salty after losing the trivia quiz.

lit.meaning_ja: （スラング）超楽しい、イケてる、盛り上がっている
lit.example: This Spotify learning playlist is lit!

slay.meaning: Slang: to perform exceptionally well or look great
slay.meaning_ja: （スラング）見事にやってのける、最高にキマっている
slay.example: You absolutely slayed that speaking prompt!

vibes.meaning: The emotional atmosphere or mood of a place, song, or person
vibes.meaning_ja: （口語）雰囲気、フィーリング、ノリ
vibes.example: This coffee shop has perfect studying vibes.

hype.example: The new season of the anime is worth the hype.

sus.meaning_ja: （ネットスラング）怪しい、胡散臭い
sus.example: That definition popup looks kinda sus.

cap.meaning: Slang: a lie or exaggeration (often used as 'no cap' meaning 'no lie')
cap.meaning_ja: （スラング）嘘、でたらめ（no cap＝本当だよ）
cap.example: I finished the Day 10 quiz, no cap.

goat.meaning_ja: 史上最高の人物、レジェンド
goat.example: CaseOh is the absolute GOAT of funny reactions.

simp.meaning: Slang: showing excessive attention or submissiveness to someone
simp.meaning_ja: （ネットスラング）特定の相手に尽くしすぎる人、盲目的なファン
simp.example: He is such a simp for that anime character.

bet.meaning_ja: （スラング）了解、もちろん、受けて立つよ

cringe.meaning: Feeling deep embarrassment or awkwardness due to someone's behavior
cringe.meaning_ja: ドン引き、見ていて恥ずかしくなる、痛々しい
cringe.example: Some of his jokes make the whole chat cringe.

chill.meaning: To relax or calm down; easygoing
chill.meaning_ja: （口語）のんびりする、落ち着く、リラックスした
chill.example: I'm just gonna chill and listen to Clairo tonight.

fire.meaning: Slang: extremely good, cool, or amazing
fire.meaning_ja: （スラング）最高、ヤバい、超かっこいい
fire.example: Clairo's new track is straight fire.

ghost.meaning: Slang: to suddenly stop communicating with someone without warning
ghost.meaning_ja: （スラング）突然連絡を絶つ、音信不通になる
ghost.example: Don't ghost your English tutor! Complete your writing.

stan.meaning: Slang: an obsessive or extremely devoted fan
stan.meaning_ja: （スラング）熱狂的なファン、オタク
stan.example: I stan this Japanese stationary journal design.

lowkey.meaning_ja: （口語）ひそかに、実は、控えめに
lowkey.example: I lowkey want to finish all 90 days in a row.

highkey.example: I highkey love the cherry blossom animation.

extra.meaning: Slang: dramatic, excessive, or over the top
extra.meaning_ja: （口語）大げさな、やりすぎの、目立ちたがりの
extra.example: She is so extra with her diary fonts.

shade.meaning: Slang: disrespectful or sneaky insults (to 'throw shade')
shade.meaning_ja: （口語）当てこすり、遠回しな批判や悪口
shade.example: Chat was throwing shade at CaseOh's gaming skills.

shook.meaning: Slang: extremely shocked, surprised, or shaken up
shook.meaning_ja: （口語）ひどくショックを受けた、驚愕した
shook.example: I was shook when I saw the length of that dialogue.

slang.meaning: Very informal words and phrases common in speech
slang.example: Learning internet slang helps you understand streams.

anime.example: I understand anime dialogue much better now.

streamer.meaning: A person who broadcasts themselves live online
streamer.example: CaseOh is a very popular Twitch streamer.

dub.meaning: A translation of a video where voices are replaced
dub.example: I prefer to watch anime dubs to test my hearing.

sub.example: Try watching CaseOh videos without subs today.
